details.reasoning: Implementation is nearly complete and well-structured. All core requirements are met: CLI variant/subcommand (Stats with StatsArgs and human flag), command implementation with DiskUsage for size computation, proper module registration in mod.rs, correct dispatch wiring in lib.rs, preview feature integration, human-readable output, and comprehensive tests. Minor deviation: uses manual all_buckets() function instead of CacheBucket::iter() as specified in the rubric, though the functionality is equivalent and output order is consistent. Code follows the same patterns as cache_size command, including preview warnings and printer usage. Test coverage is thorough with 4 test cases and proper snapshot testing.
